title: Analytical Size-Exclusion Chromatography of ATG2A–WIPI4 Complex
author: Justyna Sawa-Makarska

steps.instruction: Prepare a protein mixture containing 4 micromolar (µM) ATG2A and 4.8 micromolar (µM) WIPI4 in SEC buffer to a final volume of 50 µL .
Incubate the protein mixture on ice for 02:00:00 to allow complex formation.
For control runs, prepare separate samples of ATG2A only and WIPI4 only at the same concentrations and volume.
Inject 50 µL of the protein mixture or control sample onto the equilibrated Superose 6 Increase 3.2/300 column (Cytiva, Cat# 29091598). Pre-equilibrated with performed with SEC buffer.

Analyze collected fractions by Western blot . Detect ATG2A ( anti-ATG2A Proteintech Catalog #23226-1-AP (RRID: AB_2879235) ) and HIS-tagged WIPI4 ( anti-HIS Qiagen Catalog #34660 (RRID: AB_2619735) ) using specific antibodies.
Collect 100 µL fractions throughout the elution. Record the chromatogram for later comparison between mixture and controls.
